mapper.select: SELECT * FROM boat_messages WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM boat_messages WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND parent_message_id IS NULL AND user_id <> #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT m.* FROM boat_matches bm INNER JOIN boat_messages m ON m.id = bm.message_id WHERE bm.user_id = #{userId} AND bm.match_type = 'BOOKMARKED' AND m.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY bm.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT m.* FROM boat_matches bm INNER JOIN boat_messages m ON m.id = bm.message_id WHERE bm.user_id = #{userId} AND bm.match_type = 'RECEIVED' AND m.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY bm.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM boat_messages WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND (id = #{rootId} OR parent_message_id = #{rootId}) ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT m.* FROM boat_messages m WHERE m.is_deleted = 0 AND m.parent_message_id IS NULL AND m.user_id <> #{userId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM boat_matches bm WHERE bm.user_id = #{userId} AND bm.message_id = m.id AND bm.match_type = 'RECEIVED' ) ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE boat_messages SET reply_count = reply_count + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
